checks.name: syntax
checks.message: tsc --noEmit exits 0 on apps/web/tsconfig.json with no errors attributable to this change. The single pre-existing TS2688 (@cloudflare/workers-types missing) is a repo-wide infrastructure issue present on main before this task. All new imports (ROLES, AssetRole, InlineBorrowForm, AddAssetModal, AssetRow, InlineMatchList, FeeBreakdown, formatTimestamp, Input, Switch) resolve correctly and type-check cleanly.

checks.name: linting
checks.message: next lint and direct eslint invocation both fail with a pre-existing ESLint 9 circular-structure error caused by .eslintrc.json + next/core-web-vitals config incompatibility. This defect was present on main and documented in sub-judge-task-002.json — not introduced by this task. Two intentional eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps comments are present for mount-once URL param pre-fill effects; both are accompanied by explanatory comments per project convention.

checks.name: build
checks.message: Full OpenNext/Cloudflare Worker build not executed (requires wrangler + cloud credentials). TypeScript strict-mode typecheck passes as proxy for build correctness. No imports point to non-existent modules.

No handoff document was found for task-003 to compare against a declared touch_map.writes, but the changes are scoped to the two expected trade-UI files with no undeclared files touched. No config files, workers, or shared packages were modified.
